title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: ECI deploys over 1,000 Central observers for upcoming Assembly polls
content:
The Election Commission of India (ECI) has deployed Central observers.
*   Over 1,000 observers have been deployed for this purpose.
*   These deployments are in preparation for the upcoming 2026 Assembly elections.

title: Election officials seize ₹6 lakh unaccounted cash in Vellore, nearby districts
content:
Election officials have seized unaccounted cash.
*   The total amount confiscated is ₹6 lakh.
*   The seizures occurred in Vellore and its nearby districts.

title: Centre and State government have failed to manage LPG shortage: NCP-SP leader Jayant Patil
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   NCP-SP leader Jayant Patil has criticized the management of the LPG shortage.
*   He specifically blamed both the Central and State governments for the issue.
*   Patil stated that these governments have "failed to manage" the crisis.

title: Sharavathi Hydroelectric Project: The cost of energy transition
content:
The Sharavathi Hydroelectric Project is highlighted as a specific example of efforts towards energy transition.
*   It specifically examines the various "costs" – potentially financial, environmental, or social – associated with developing such green energy infrastructure.
*   The headline implies that while necessary, the shift to sustainable energy sources like hydro can involve significant trade-offs and challenges.

title: ‘BJP diluting rural job scheme’: Chhattisgarh Congress stages protest
content:
The Chhattisgarh Congress has accused the BJP of weakening a crucial rural job scheme.
*   In response to these allegations, the Congress party has staged protests.
*   The protests highlight concerns over the scheme's effectiveness and its impact on rural employment.

title: Pinarayi Vijayan launches election campaign at Dharmadam
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Pinarayi Vijayan has launched his election campaign.
*   This marks the official commencement of his campaign efforts.
*   The launch event took place in Dharmadam.

title: India Post launches 24-hour and 48-hour speed post services
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   India Post has introduced new, faster speed post services.
*   A 24-hour delivery option is now available for urgent shipments.
*   Customers can also opt for a 48-hour speed post service.

title: Karnataka government plans new Excise Act to curb illegal sale of liquor
content:
The Karnataka government is planning to introduce a new Excise Act.
*   The primary objective of this new legislation is to curb the illegal sale of liquor.
*   It aims to tackle illicit liquor trade within the state.

title: There are some problems in supply of certain drugs only at primary health centres: Karnataka Health Minister
content:
The Karnataka Health Minister has acknowledged problems with drug supply.
*   These issues are specific to certain types of drugs.
*   The supply problems are occurring only at primary health centres.

title: Redeployment of specialist doctors from CHCs to taluk hospitals done to reduce neonatal mortality, says Karnataka Health Minister
content:
Specialist doctors in Karnataka have been redeployed from Community Health Centers (CHCs) to taluk hospitals.
*   This redeployment aims to significantly reduce neonatal mortality.
*   The move was announced by the Karnataka Health Minister as a strategic initiative.
